description: Black bagTextured with shiny overlays, metal stud and stitch detailingOne main compartment with a zipped closureAn inner zipped separator sleeve compartmentAn organiser sleeve on one side and a zipped pocket on the other sideA narrow flap over the mouth with a triangular metal detailingAn outer zipped pocket at the backTwo short handles connected to the bag with metal ringsTwo synthetic tabs at the bottom secured with metal studs
